	if (!window.cs) window.cs = {};
	window.cs.loadExternalComponent = function(cb) {
		return Vue.defineAsyncComponent(() => {
			return new Promise(function poller(resolve) {
				const result = cb();
				if (!result) {
					window.setTimeout(() => poller(resolve), 100);
				} else {
					resolve(result);
				}
			});
		});
	}
</script>

	if (!window.cs) window.cs = {};
	window.cs.loadExternalComponent = function(cb) {
		return Vue.defineAsyncComponent(() => {
			return new Promise(function poller(resolve) {
				const result = cb();
				if (!result) {
					window.setTimeout(() => poller(resolve), 100);
				} else {
					resolve(result);
				}
			});
		});
	}
</script>
